name: player_season_projected_points single year_offset returns the offset-year projection (executed-result parity)
description: Seed one player with distinct 2024 (100) and 2025 (200) season projected points, then run player_season_projected_points with year=[2023] + year_offset=[1]. The executed value must equal the 2024 projection (100), proving the single offset shifts the join year and does not return the base or some other year.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "t3bbf1d9c941eda2597574bd44af9f16e"."total" AS "season_projected_points_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "scoring_format_player_projection_points" as "t3bbf1d9c941eda2597574bd44af9f16e" on "t3bbf1d9c941eda2597574bd44af9f16e"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t3bbf1d9c941eda2597574bd44af9f16e"."year" = 2024 and "t3bbf1d9c941eda2597574bd44af9f16e"."week" = '0' and "t3bbf1d9c941eda2597574bd44af9f16e"."scoring_format_id" = 'draftkings' where player.pos IN ('ZZ') group by player.fname, player.lname, "t3bbf1d9c941eda2597574bd44af9f16e"."total", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500

seed: INSERT INTO player (pid, fname, lname, pname, formatted, pos, pos1, dob, nfl_draft_year) VALUES ('TEST-PROJ-2000-2000-01-01', 'Test', 'Proj', 'T.Proj', 'Test Proj', 'ZZ', 'ZZ', '2000-01-01', 2020)
INSERT INTO scoring_format_player_projection_points (pid, week, year, total, scoring_format_id) VALUES ('TEST-PROJ-2000-2000-01-01', '0', 2024, 100.00, 'draftkings')
INSERT INTO scoring_format_player_projection_points (pid, week, year, total, scoring_format_id) VALUES ('TEST-PROJ-2000-2000-01-01', '0', 2025, 200.00, 'draftkings')
result_equivalence.reference_sql: SELECT total AS season_projected_points_0 FROM scoring_format_player_projection_points WHERE pid = 'TEST-PROJ-2000-2000-01-01' AND year = 2024 AND week = '0' AND scoring_format_id = 'draftkings'
